name: canary
description: Sonomos Canary — persistent PII leak counter for Claude Code. 36 checksum-validated regex detectors (plus your own via rules.d) and Claude self-scan catch sensitive data you expose to AI, Canary Tokens give a CERTAIN alarm the instant a planted decoy secret reaches Claude, and Canary Wrapped turns your exposure history into a shareable recap. Backed by a weighted risk score, an interactive dashboard, a persistent HUD, and a plugin-security audit (/canary:audit) for your installed skills, agents, and MCP configs.

llm_scan_enabled.title: Enable LLM scan
llm_scan_enabled.description: Enable automatic Claude self-scan for semantic PII after every prompt (default: true)

confidence_threshold.title: Confidence threshold
confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence to record a detection: high or medium (default: medium)
